original_question: Which positions had the strongest closing hour performance over the last 20 trading days?

key_insights: Question asks to identify and rank open positions
Analysis required for a specific intraday time segment (closing hour)
Pattern: Data retrieval + specialized intraday analysis

decomposition.reasoning: This is a composite question requiring two steps: (1) retrieve list of open positions, (2) analyze closing hour performance for those positions over 20-day lookback period. A new utility is needed to specifically analyze closing hour performance metrics.

sub_questions.description: Analyze closing hour performance for identified positions
sub_questions.purpose: Calculate performance metrics specifically for the closing hour (final hour of trading session) over the last 20 trading days, then rank positions by strength

new_utilities.name: analyze_closing_hour_performance
new_utilities.description: Analyze the closing hour (final hour of trading session) performance for a list of symbols over a specified lookback period (e.g., 20 trading days) to identify which positions show the strongest closing hour performance. Calculates closing hour returns, win rates, consistency, and generates a performance strength score to rank positions.

notes: New utility 'analyze_closing_hour_performance' needed to support closing hour specific analysis
This utility fills gap in existing library for time-segment specific intraday performance metrics
Utility will be added alphabetically to the question_utility_library_final.json
